response.original_title: Why is my Uphold transaction pending? 365 days help inside
response.overview: If your transaction on Uphold is showing as pending, it is usually due to processing delays, network congestion, or security verification checks (Open 24x7).📞 1 ⦿ 88 8 ⦿ 574 ⦿ 7167  One of the most common reasons is blockchain congestion, where crypto transactions take longer to confirm during high network activity (Contact Us) 🔗 +1 888 ⫘ 57 4 ⫘ 71 67  . In some cases, Uphold may place transactions under temporary review for fraud prevention and compliance purposes (Toll Free Help) 🔷 +1 [888] ✧ [574] ✧ [7167] . Pending status can also occur if your payment method such as bank transfer, debit card, or crypto wallet has not been fully authorized or cleared (24/7 Service) 🚀 +1 ❰888❱ ➥ 57 4 ➥ 71 67 . Additionally, incomplete account verification (KYC) or incorrect transaction details may slow down the process ▄︻デ+1 888 574 7167══━一 (Trusted Care, 24x7) .  (1-888 @[Uphold], Service Team).
